layoutRegions.name: runbook-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: At-a-glance counts for tasks, app queues, orphaned sessions, and rollback checkpoints.

layoutRegions.name: task-queue
layoutRegions.purpose: Keyboard-focusable deprovisioning tasks with due time, system, owner, and blocker evidence.

layoutRegions.name: evidence-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Suspended identity, app offboarding, session revocation, sign-off, and rollback guardrail panels.

components.name: TaskRow
components.purpose: Focusable runbook row for a deprovisioning task and its current blocker.
interactions: hover and focus-visible states expose selection
status tone is shown with semantic danger, warning, success, or info

components.name: EvidenceCard
components.purpose: Compact evidence surface for suspended identities and app offboarding queues.
interactions: stable card sizing across viewport changes
tone label stays visible without overlapping text

components.name: RollbackGuardrail
components.purpose: Ordered disablement checklist for rollback-safe account exits.
interactions: primary disablement action has visible hover and focus-visible states
guardrail numbers are stable and token-colored

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
